topBanner.underConstruction: Site under construction - we appreciate constructive feedback!

home.subtitle: We connect quality, create value, measure and promote the effects of ecosystem stakeholders on the international stage. We encourage systemic and complementary thinking to raise quality and accessibility.
home.esgDescription: ESG stands for three pillars of sustainable development: Environmental, Social, and Governance. It is not compliance or a report - it is a way of thinking about business that generates value for all stakeholders.
home.environmentDesc: Climate, resources, renewable energy, carbon footprint
home.whySImpact: Why do we focus on S-Impact?
home.sImpactDesc: In our ecosystem, S is not an add-on - it is the heart of the entire system. S-Impact means measurable, documented social impact.
home.sImpactBullet1: We support neurodiversity, women in business, and innovators excluded by the system
home.sImpactBullet2: We build intergenerational bridges - children and grandparents learn together
home.sImpactBullet3: Every social action is tokenized - immutably recorded and verifiable
home.sImpactBullet4: We promote the Polish brand internationally through ethical business
home.successQuote: At Constellation.love, we do not measure success by position, status, or results alone. Equal does not mean fair.
home.workshopsTitle: We will lead entrepreneurship workshops for your team
home.schoolTitle: Let us develop entrepreneurship in Polish schools together
home.schoolCta: Write to me - I will share the program

hero.description: Irrefutable digital proof of invention existence at the pre-patent stage. A shield that works before theft - not after.
hero.elevatorPitch: - a self-sufficient ecosystem where the investor is also the client, and complementary projects exchange value without intermediaries.
